summary: Comprehensive testing of 21 new hotels update complete. All 59 hotels render correctly. New hotels display 'FROM €[price]' pricing (not discount badges), show category and region tags, have unique real photos from Pexels/Unsplash, and deal text on card back. Old hotels retain 'Save X%' discount badges. QuickView modal works for new hotels.
